title: helia gracilis
intro: Helia gracilis, also known as the slender heliotrope, is a plant species belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae) that is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. Traditionally, the leaves and flowers of Helia gracilis have been used in herbal medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems. Helia gracilis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
